case_title: KIN YIP MA VS. MARY ANN LUM

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MA, KIN YIP AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, MARY ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, MARY ANN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUL-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, MARY ANN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY MA, KIN YIP LUM, MARY ANN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, KIN YIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUM, MARY ANN $2,759.90 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,809.90, DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
